message:
test(fsqlite-mvcc): write skew detection test suite (bd-iwu.4, section 2.3)

Add 7 SSI write skew tests implementing the bd-iwu.4 test plan:
- test_write_skew_sum_constraint: canonical A+B>=0 sum constraint
- test_write_skew_mutual_exclusion: T1 reads A/writes B, T2 reads
  B/writes A cross-dependency pattern
- test_write_skew_three_way: 3-transaction cycle (T1→T2→T3→T1)
- test_write_skew_read_only_anomaly: Fekete 2005 read-only anomaly
  (read-only txns never abort)
- test_no_write_skew_under_serialized_mode: BEGIN IMMEDIATE prevents
  write skew by acquiring exclusive locks upfront
- test_write_skew_with_indexes: write skew via shared index page
  traversal mediation

Tests manually set has_in_rw/has_out_rw flags on MVCC transactions and
assert MvccError::BusySnapshot on commit for detected conflicts.

Add tracing-subscriber as workspace dev-dep for test diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
